creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
PR has bad checksums and plist.  New and improved diff below:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile     2009-08-28 09:46:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./munger/Makefile   2009-09-03 18:25:39.000000000 -0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=      munger
-PORTVERSION=   4.170
+PORTVERSION=   4.171
  CATEGORIES=    lang
  MASTER_SITES=  http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo     2009-08-28 09:46:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./munger/distinfo   2009-09-03 18:25:05.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.170.tar.gz) = 88063f85f4e02fb014a45ff5d020f61a
-SHA256 (munger-4.170.tar.gz) = 
a49135ae3ea06d2652f6b46eaccc975a29452b4c83e1e798ae99062cf6ca3a6a
-SIZE (munger-4.170.tar.gz) = 261386
+MD5 (munger-4.171.tar.gz) = f26cd877ff373135b4f391b0aa460c3b
+SHA256 (munger-4.171.tar.gz) = 
b75a8e2da8d0ed5b49a2993aadfde33f5d36d51aa9805482ada392a554e616eb
+SIZE (munger-4.171.tar.gz) = 261257
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist    2009-08-28 09:46:24.000000000 -0400
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist  2009-09-03 18:24:41.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.55
+lib/libmunger.so.57
  %%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/httpd.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/scgid.munger
